~From the lack of activity on this port, it's obviously not a high
priority with anybody.  Nevertheless, you might want to upgrade to the
latest/greatest version, which is, IIRC, 4.0.2.  I will add that I
use the package as it comes from sourceforge with no changes or
patches required.

Bob Melson

- --
Robert G. Melson | Rio Grande MicroSolutions | El Paso, Texas

hungry for power." ---Eric Hoffer
